components.name: BaseTable
components.description: Low-level headless table component built on TanStack Table. Provides full control over rendering with support for sticky header/footer, row grouping, virtualization, drag-and-drop reordering, custom row content, resize handles, sort indicators, and empty state.

props.name: table
props.description: The table instance returned from the useTable hook

props.name: attributes
props.description: HTML attributes for the table element

props.name: bodyAttributes
props.description: HTML attributes for the tbody element

props.name: bodyClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the tbody element

props.name: bodyRef
props.description: Ref for the tbody element

props.name: cellAttributes
props.description: HTML attributes for td elements inside tbody

props.name: cellClassName
props.description: CSS classes for td elements inside tbody

props.name: className
props.description: CSS classes for the table element

props.name: customFooterRowCount
props.description: Used with renderCustomFooterContent to set correct aria-rowcount

props.name: emptyContent
props.description: Content displayed when the table has no data rows

props.name: footerAttributes
props.description: HTML attributes for the tfoot element

props.name: footerCellAttributes
props.description: HTML attributes for th elements inside tfoot

props.name: footerCellClassName
props.description: CSS classes for th elements inside tfoot

props.name: footerClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the tfoot element

props.name: footerRowAttributes
props.description: HTML attributes for tr elements inside tfoot

props.name: footerRowClassName
props.description: CSS classes for tr elements inside tfoot

props.name: getGroupTitle
props.description: Returns the title for a group header row

props.name: getIsCustomRow
props.description: Checks if the row is custom and should be rendered using renderCustomRowContent

props.name: getIsGroupHeaderRow
props.description: Checks if the row should be rendered as a group header

props.name: groupHeaderClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the group header elements

props.name: headerAttributes
props.description: HTML attributes for the thead element

props.name: headerCellAttributes
props.description: HTML attributes for th elements inside thead

props.name: headerCellClassName
props.description: CSS classes for th elements inside thead

props.name: headerClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the thead element

props.name: headerRowAttributes
props.description: HTML attributes for tr elements inside thead

props.name: headerRowClassName
props.description: CSS classes for tr elements inside thead

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Click handler for rows inside tbody

props.name: renderCustomFooterContent
props.type: (props: {cellClassName: string; footerGroups: HeaderGroup<TData>[]; rowClassName: string; rowIndex: number}) => React.ReactNode
props.description: Function to render custom footer content

props.name: renderCustomRowContent
props.description: Function to render custom rows

props.name: renderGroupHeader
props.description: Function to override the default rendering of group headers

props.name: renderGroupHeaderRowContent
props.description: Function to override the default rendering of the entire group header row

props.name: renderHeaderCellContent
props.description: Function to override the default rendering of header cell content

props.name: renderResizeHandle
props.description: Function to override the default rendering of resize handles

props.name: renderSortIndicator
props.description: Function to override the default rendering of sort indicators

props.name: resizeHandleClassName
props.description: CSS classes for resize handles in th elements

props.name: rowAttributes
props.description: HTML attributes for tr elements inside tbody

props.name: rowClassName
props.description: CSS classes for tr elements inside tbody

props.name: rowVirtualizer
props.description: The row virtualizer instance returned from useRowVirtualizer or useWindowRowVirtualizer hooks

props.name: sortIndicatorClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the sort indicator inside th elements

props.name: stickyFooter
props.description: Makes the tfoot element sticky

props.name: stickyHeader
props.description: Makes the thead element sticky

props.name: withFooter
props.description: Determines whether the tfoot element should be rendered

props.name: withHeader
props.description: Determines whether the thead element should be rendered

components.name: RangedSelectionCheckbox
components.description: A checkbox component that supports Shift+Click range selection of table rows. Wraps GravityUI Checkbox with range selection handler.

props.name: cellContext
props.description: TanStack Table cell context for the checkbox cell

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the checkbox

components.name: ReorderingProvider
components.description: Provider component that enables drag-and-drop row reordering. Wraps table content with dnd-kit's DndContext and SortableContext.

props.name: table
props.description: The table instance returned from the useTable hook

props.name: children
props.description: Children content (typically the table component)

props.name: dndModifiers
props.description: A list of dnd-kit modifiers

props.name: enableNesting
props.description: Determines whether elements can be nested using drag-and-drop

props.name: onReorder
props.description: Reorder handler triggered when the dnd-kit onDragEnd event fires

components.name: ExperimentalRowLink
components.description: A component that wraps GravityUI Link to render a clickable link overlay for a table row. Only renders when href is provided.

props.name: href
props.description: URL for the row link. Component renders null if not provided

components.name: SortIndicator
components.description: Enhanced sort indicator component that renders an icon with a tooltip showing the next sort action (ascending, descending, or reset).

props.name: header
props.description: TanStack Table header instance

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the sort indicator

components.name: Table
components.description: High-level styled table component that extends BaseTable with size variants, vertical alignment options, and opinionated styling. The primary component for most table use cases.

props.name: table
props.description: The table instance returned from the useTable hook

props.name: size
props.description: Table size variant

props.name: verticalAlign
props.description: Row vertical alignment

props.name: headerVerticalAlign
props.description: Header row vertical alignment

props.name: footerVerticalAlign
props.description: Footer row vertical alignment

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the table element

props.name: cellClassName
props.description: CSS class for body cells

props.name: headerCellClassName
props.type: string | ((header: Header<TData, TValue>, parentHeader?: Header<TData, unknown>) => string)
props.description: CSS class for header cells

props.name: footerCellClassName
props.description: CSS class for footer cells

props.name: rowClassName
props.description: CSS class for body rows

props.name: headerClassName
props.description: CSS class for the thead element

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Click handler for rows

components.name: TableSettings
components.description: A popup-based table settings component that allows users to toggle column visibility and reorder columns via drag-and-drop. Includes optional search filtering for column names.

props.name: table
props.description: TanStack Table instance

props.name: sortable
props.description: Enables column reordering via drag-and-drop

props.name: filterable
props.description: Enables column visibility toggling via checkboxes

props.name: enableSearch
props.description: Enables search input to filter columns by name

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the search input

props.name: onSettingsApply
props.description: Callback when settings are applied

components.name: TreeExpandableCell
components.description: A cell component for tree-structured tables that renders an expand/collapse toggle button with an arrow indicator alongside cell content.

props.name: row
props.description: TanStack Table row instance

props.name: children
props.description: Cell content rendered alongside the expand toggle

hooks.name: useTable
hooks.description: Wrapper around TanStack's useReactTable that provides sensible defaults (all features disabled by default) and automatically configures row models based on enabled features.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Table options extending TanStack TableOptions with defaults for enableColumnPinning, enableColumnResizing, enableExpanding, enableGrouping, enableMultiRowSelection, enableRowSelection, enableSorting, enableColumnFilters, enableGlobalFilter, manualGrouping, manualSorting, manualFiltering (all default to false)

hooks.name: useRowVirtualizer
hooks.description: Wrapper around TanStack Virtual's useVirtualizer hook, typed for table row virtualization with a scrollable container element.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Virtualizer options from @tanstack/react-virtual, typed for HTMLTableRowElement

hooks.name: useWindowRowVirtualizer
hooks.description: Wrapper around TanStack Virtual's useWindowVirtualizer hook, typed for table row virtualization using the window as the scroll container.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Window virtualizer options from @tanstack/react-virtual, typed for HTMLTableRowElement

hooks.name: useDraggableRowDepth
hooks.description: Hook that calculates the nesting depth of a draggable row based on drag state, target position, and nesting mode. Used internally by BaseDraggableRow.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: The table instance returned from the useTable hook

parameters.name: isDragging
parameters.description: Determines whether the row is being dragged

hooks.name: useTableSettings
hooks.description: Hook that manages table column visibility and ordering state. Provides state and callbacks compatible with TanStack Table's onColumnVisibilityChange and onColumnOrderChange options.
hooks.signature: (options?: UseTableSettingsOptions) => {state: {columnVisibility: VisibilityState; columnOrder: string[]}; callbacks: {onColumnVisibilityChange: (value: Updater<VisibilityState>) => void; onColumnOrderChange: (value: Updater<string[]>) => void}}
hooks.return_type: {state: {columnVisibility: VisibilityState; columnOrder: string[]}; callbacks: {onColumnVisibilityChange: (value: Updater<VisibilityState>) => void; onColumnOrderChange: (value: Updater<string[]>) => void}}

hooks.name: useToggleRangeSelectionHandler
hooks.description: Hook that returns a checkbox change handler supporting Shift+Click range selection of table rows. Tracks last selected row via context for range calculations.
hooks.signature: <TData extends RowData, TValue>(cellContext: CellContext<TData, TValue>) => (event: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void

parameters.name: cellContext
parameters.description: TanStack Table cell context for the selection checkbox cell

hooks.name: experimentalUseColumnsAutoSize
hooks.description: Hook that automatically calculates optimal column widths by measuring cell content. Supports header text measurement, sample-based sizing, min/max constraints, and respects user-resized columns.
hooks.signature: <TData>(props: UseColumnsAutoSizeProps<TData>) => {columnWidths: Record<string, number>; setTableInstance: (table: Table<TData> | null) => void; columnsWithAutoSizes: ColumnDef<TData>[]; isMeasuring: boolean}

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Options including minWidth (default 50), maxWidth (default 500), padding (default 16), headerPadding (default 24), sampleSize (default 100), measureHeaderText (default true), respectExistingWidths (default true), respectResizedWidths (default true)

parameters.name: renderElementForMeasure
parameters.description: Function to wrap content in a measurement container

hooks.return_type: {columnWidths: Record<string, number>; setTableInstance: (table: Table<TData> | null) => void; columnsWithAutoSizes: ColumnDef<TData>[]; isMeasuring: boolean}
